title: Junior Instructional Designer at ASCI International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at ASCI International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Join the ASCI International Enterprises family as a Instructional Designer in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ASCI International Enterprises:
ASCI International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ASCI International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
